author: gb9t
content: Iter 126 result: net/8021q/vlan_dev.md (VLAN-dev netdev_ops detail - vlan_dev.c ~1087 lines; ndo_init/uninit/open/stop/start_xmit/change_mtu/set_mac_address/set_rx_mode/change_rx_flags/select_queue/get_stats64/eth_ioctl + features inherited from real_dev.vlan_features minus NETIF_F_HW_VLAN_* + MTU caps real_dev.mtu - VLAN_HLEN sw-mode + dev_uc_add propagation on MAC-change + dev_uc_sync/mc_sync on rx-mode + IFF_PROMISC/ALLMULTI ±1 propagation + per-cpu vlan_pcpu_stats + ingress_priority_map PCP→skb.priority + napi_gro_receive + skb_vlan_push or __vlan_hwaccel_put_tag) + virt/kvm/x86-vmx-msr-autoload.md (VMX MSR autoload/store - vmx.c msr-autoload subset ~200 lines; per-vCPU 3 lists msr_autoload.guest/host + msr_autostore + struct vmx_msr_entry {index, reserved, value} 16-byte + VM_ENTRY_MSR_LOAD_COUNT/ADDR + VM_EXIT_MSR_LOAD_COUNT/ADDR + VM_EXIT_MSR_STORE_COUNT/ADDR vmcs fields + VMX_MSR_LIST_SIZE 512 cap + add/clear_atomic_switch_msr + special-case MSR_EFER via vmcs.GUEST_IA32_EFER + VM_ENTRY_LOAD_IA32_EFER bit + special-case MSR_IA32_PERF_GLOBAL_CTRL via vmcs.GUEST_IA32_PERF_GLOBAL_CTRL + HW atomic save/restore eliminating manual RDMSR/WRMSR per-vmenter/vmexit). 202 Tier-3s total. Next iter: net/bonding/bond.md (bonding driver) + virt/kvm/x86-vmx-vpid.md cross-check or pivot.
